description: All queries against partitioned tables must include a partition filter on the partition column (order_date). Queries without a partition filter will be rejected.
rationale: Unfiltered queries on 180 TB table cost ~$900 per execution. Partition filters reduce scan to <10 GB (<$0.05).

description: Estimated bytes scanned per query must be below 10 GB (10,737,418,240 bytes). Queries exceeding this threshold indicate missing or insufficient partition pruning.
rationale: Cost governance policy: single analytical query must not exceed $0.05.
